payload: Organize the core concepts of the Ralph Orchestrator project and transform them into engaging, easy-to-understand (high school level and above) popular science articles. payload.instructions: Write a popular science article introducing the Six Tenets of Ralph as a unified philosophy. Use vivid metaphors and examples. Explain each tenet briefly, emphasizing how they work together as an organic whole. This article serves as an overview - later articles will detail individual tenets. Follow the style of previous articles (01 and 02). Write in Chinese.
